Source: Amazon Q Business API Reference
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/api-reference/Welcome.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Q Business API Reference

## Services
- QBusiness APIs: Main API for Amazon Q Business operations
- QApps APIs: Lightweight, purpose-built AI apps within Q Business

## Authentication
- IAM Roles required for both services
- Web experience IAM role for Amazon Q Apps

## Features
- Question-answering and knowledge discovery
- Writing email messages and summarizing text
- Document outline drafting
- QApps for task-specific AI applications (marketing content, customer emails)

## Resources
- AWS CLI Reference available
- Setup guide for Amazon Q Business
- Amazon Q in AWS General Reference
